title: Genetics
description: Defines the way a mob's genes and alleles are passed on to its offspring, and how those traits manifest in the child. Compatible parent genes are crossed together, the alleles are handed down from the parents to the child, and any matching genetic variants fire off JSON events to modify the child and express the traits.

genes.title: Genes
genes.description:
The list of genes that this entity has and will cross with a partner during breeding.

Properties:
• allele_range (int)
• genetic_variants
• mutation_rate (float) = -1
• name (string)
• use_simplified_breeding (boolean)

Sample values:
• goat: [{"name":"goat_variant","use_simplified_breedin...

defaultSnippets.label: Allele Range (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Allele Range as an object

allele_range.title: Allele Range
allele_range.description: The range of positive integer allele values for this gene. Spawned mobs will have a random number in this range assigned to them. Can be a single integer or an object with range_min and range_max properties.

defaultSnippets.label: Allele Range (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Allele Range as an object

genetic_variants.title: Genetic Variants
genetic_variants.description:
The list of genetic variants for this gene. These check for particular allele combinations and fire events when all of them are satisfied.

Properties:
• birth_event
• both_allele (int) = -1
• either_allele (int) = -1
• hidden_allele (int) = -1
• main_allele (int) = -1

birth_event.title: Birth Event
birth_event.description: Event to run when this mob is created and matches the allele conditions.

defaultSnippets.label: Both Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Both Allele as an object

both_allele.title: Both Allele
both_allele.description: If this value is non-negative, compare both the mob's main and hidden alleles with this value for a match with both. Can also be a range of integers.

defaultSnippets.label: Both Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Both Allele as an object

defaultSnippets.label: Either Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Either Allele as an object

either_allele.title: Either Allele
either_allele.description: If this value is non-negative, compare both the mob's main and hidden alleles with this value for a match with either. Can also be a range of integers.

defaultSnippets.label: Either Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Either Allele as an object

defaultSnippets.label: Hidden Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Hidden Allele as an object

hidden_allele.title: Hidden Allele
hidden_allele.description: If this value is non-negative, compare the mob's hidden allele with this value for a match. Can also be a range of integers.

defaultSnippets.label: Hidden Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Hidden Allele as an object

defaultSnippets.label: Main Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Main Allele as an object

main_allele.title: Main Allele
main_allele.description: If this value is non-negative, compare the mob's main allele with this value for a match. Can also be a range of integers.

defaultSnippets.label: Main Allele (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Main Allele as an object

mutation_rate.title: Mutation Rate
mutation_rate.description: If this value is non-negative, overrides the chance for this gene that an allele will be replaced with a random one instead of the parent's allele during birth. Non-negative values greater than `1` will be the same as the value `1`.

use_simplified_breeding.title: Use Simplified Breeding
use_simplified_breeding.description: If true, mobs spawned from breeding will always inherit main alleles from parents' main alleles and hidden alleles from the hidden ones.

mutation_rate.title: Mutation Rate
mutation_rate.description:
Chance that an allele will be replaced with a random one instead of the parent's allele during birth.

Sample values:
• goat: 0.02
